description_long: This is a modern laptop with a slim, rectangular form factor and a large, black display screen surrounded by a thin bezel. The keyboard is full-sized, featuring a QWERTY layout with a function row and a numeric keypad, and is set into a metallic gray chassis. The touchpad is centered below the keyboard, and there are visible stickers on the right palm rest area, likely indicating hardware specifications. The laptop's hinge mechanism is robust, allowing the screen to remain upright at a comfortable viewing angle. The exterior appears to be constructed primarily from metal and plastic, with a smooth, matte finish. No visible brand logo is present on the lid or palm rest.
description: A sleek, metallic gray laptop with a large black screen, full keyboard, and touchpad, featuring hardware stickers on the palm rest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, touchpad, and large black screen with visible stickers on the right palm rest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile, keyboard edge, and the open screen at an upright angle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the screen and the overall width of the laptop, with no visible ports or logos.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the keyboard edge, touchpad, and the open screen, mirroring the left side profile.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with function row and numeric keypad, standard English language keys.
attribute_sticker_placement: There are stickers on the right palm rest area, near the touchpad, featuring blue and gray colors.
